rules.baseline.api-key-in-env: Suspected credentials in settings env (API key/token/secret/password/GH_TOKEN etc.)
rules.baseline.dangerous-hook: Hook command contains dangerous commands (curl|sh, rm -rf, base64 exec, eval)
rules.baseline.wildcard-write-edit: Wildcard write permission Edit(**) or Write(**) present
rules.baseline.unrestricted-webfetch: Wildcard WebFetch(*) permission present, arbitrary outbound requests allowed
rules.baseline.remote-script-in-settings: settings references remote script execution (curl/wget fetching https URL)
rules.baseline.mcp-unpinned: MCP server uses npx/uvx/docker without pinned version (@version or @sha256)
rules.baseline.mcp-env-credentials: MCP server env contains suspected credentials (TOKEN/SECRET/KEY/PASSWORD)
rules.baseline.dangerous-skip-with-network: skipDangerousModePermissionPrompt coexists with network/write commands, very high risk
rules.injection.hidden-instruction.skill: Hidden instruction pattern detected (ignore above / system prompt override)
rules.injection.hidden-instruction.command: Hidden instruction pattern detected (ignore above / system prompt override)
rules.injection.hidden-instruction.agent: Hidden instruction pattern detected (ignore above / system prompt override)
rules.injection.hidden-instruction.memory: Hidden instruction pattern detected (ignore above / system prompt override)
rules.injection.hidden-instruction.mcp_server: Hidden instruction pattern detected (ignore above / system prompt override)
rules.injection.hidden-instruction.script: Hidden instruction pattern detected (ignore above / system prompt override)
rules.injection.exfiltration.skill: Data exfiltration instruction detected (reading sensitive files and sending out)
rules.injection.exfiltration.command: Data exfiltration instruction detected (reading sensitive files and sending out)
rules.injection.exfiltration.agent: Data exfiltration instruction detected (reading sensitive files and sending out)
rules.injection.exfiltration.memory: Data exfiltration instruction detected (reading sensitive files and sending out)
rules.injection.exfiltration.mcp_server: Data exfiltration instruction detected (reading sensitive files and sending out)
rules.injection.exfiltration.script: Data exfiltration instruction detected (reading sensitive files and sending out)
rules.injection.prompt-injection.p1: Prompt injection detected: instruction override / jailbreak pattern
rules.injection.prompt-injection.p2: Hidden instruction detected (HTML comment / RTL control char / zero-width)
rules.injection.prompt-injection.p4: Behavior manipulation instruction detected (inducing preference / bypassing user awareness)
rules.injection.anti-refusal.ar1: Refusal-suppression instruction detected (attempting to bypass safety refusal)
rules.injection.anti-refusal.ar2: Disclaimer/warning suppression instruction detected (suppressing safety prompts)
rules.injection.anti-refusal.ar3: Safety policy invalidation instruction detected (jailbreak framework)
rules.injection.memory-poisoning.mp1: Persistent context injection detected (cross-session memory manipulation)
rules.injection.memory-poisoning.mp2: Context padding / repeated string flood detected (may push out system prompt)
rules.injection.memory-poisoning.mp3: Direct memory manipulation detected (clearing / overwriting / planting false memory)
rules.injection.prompt-leakage.p6: System prompt direct extraction instruction detected
rules.injection.prompt-leakage.p7: System prompt indirect extraction detected (side channel / inference)
rules.injection.prompt-leakage.p8: System prompt exfiltration via tool instruction detected
rules.injection.agent-snooping.as1: Agent config directory access detected (may steal API key / config)
rules.injection.agent-snooping.as2: MCP config access detected (may steal MCP server credentials)
rules.injection.agent-snooping.as3: Skill enumeration detected (reading other skills' SKILL.md)
rules.injection.rogue-agent.ra1: Skill self-modification detected (modifying its own code/config at runtime)
rules.injection.rogue-agent.ra2: Hidden directory creation detected (may establish unauthorized persistence)
rules.injection.tool-misuse.tm1: Tool parameter abuse detected (dangerous params / destructive commands)
rules.injection.tool-misuse.tm2: Command chaining abuse detected (bypassing safety checks)
rules.injection.tool-misuse.tm3: Insecure default detected (TLS verification disabled / auth disabled)
rules.injection.privilege-escalation.pe2: sudo privilege escalation detected (excluding safe queries -v/-l/--version/--list)
rules.injection.privilege-escalation.pe3: Credential file access detected (SSH key / AWS credentials / shadow)
rules.injection.data-exfiltration.e2: Environment variable collection detected (may steal credentials)
rules.injection.data-exfiltration.e3: Filesystem enumeration detected (scanning for credentials/config files)
rules.injection.excessive-agency.ea1: Unrestricted tool access detected (tools: ["*"] or all tools)
rules.injection.excessive-agency.ea2: Autonomous decision instruction detected (bypassing user confirmation)
rules.skill.description-hidden-instruction: skill frontmatter description contains hidden instruction (HTML comment / zero-width / base64 obfuscation)
rules.skill.description-unicode-spoofing: skill frontmatter description contains homoglyph / RTL override character
rules.skill.parameter-description-injection: skill parameter description contains SYSTEM:/override/exfiltration phrase
rules.skill.missing-allowed-tools: skill has capability indication but no allowed-tools declared
